# Bernard Zachara — Cloud / DevOps Enthusiast (Full Context)

> This is the extended LLM context file for zachara.dev. It contains the complete resume, project details, and technical background for Bernard Zachara.

## About

Bernard Zachara is a Cloud / DevOps enthusiast building hands-on experience in container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and self-hosted cloud infrastructure. Passionate about automation, reliability, and building practical systems that can be deployed and operated end to end.

## Skills

### Containers & Orchestration
Docker, Kubernetes, K3s, containerd

### CI/CD
GitHub Actions, GHCR

### Cloud Platforms
Oracle Cloud (production), AWS (learning), Azure (learning)

### Networking & Security
Traefik, Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban

### Scripting & Languages
Bash, Python, TypeScript, YAML

## Experience

### Self-Directed Cloud / DevOps Projects (2024 — Present)
- Built and maintained a K3s cluster on an Ubuntu-based Oracle Cloud VPS with Traefik ingress
- Designed CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for container builds and GHCR publishing
- Secured host and admin access with Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban, and SSH keys
- Automated maintenance tasks with Bash scripts, cron, and systemd timers
- Containerized applications with Docker using multi-stage builds and security best practices

## Education & Certifications

### University of Information Technology and Management in Rzeszów
Expected March 2028

### Continuous Self-Directed Learning
Cloud architecture, Kubernetes administration, infrastructure as code, and DevOps practices through hands-on projects, labs, and documentation.

### Pursuing
AWS Solutions Architect · CKA (Certified Kubernetes Administrator)

## Projects (Live on GitHub)

### zachara-dev
This portfolio site — built with Astro, TypeScript, and Bun, then pre-rendered to static HTML. Dockerized and deployed to K3s on Oracle Cloud with GitHub Actions CI/CD.
- Tech: Astro, TypeScript, Bun, Docker, K3s, GitHub Actions, GHCR
- URL: https://github.com/benzac708/zachara-dev

### vps-ops-toolkit
VPS maintenance scripts for Linux hosts running K3s — safe reboot with drain, disk/Docker cleanup, security health checks, auto-updates via systemd timers.
- Tech: Bash, K3s, UFW, fail2ban, systemd
- URL: https://github.com/benzac708/vps-ops-toolkit

### cloud-labs-iac
Terraform learning labs for AWS and Azure — basic infrastructure provisioning to practice init/plan/apply/destroy lifecycle.
- Tech: Terraform, AWS, Azure
- URL: https://github.com/benzac708/cloud-labs-iac

## Infrastructure

This site is built with Astro, TypeScript, and Bun, styled with TailwindCSS v4, and deployed on a K3s cluster on Oracle Cloud. Traffic flows through Traefik ingress. CI/CD via GitHub Actions builds Docker images and publishes them to GHCR.

## Contact

- Email: bernard@zachara.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708
- Website: https://zachara.dev
